requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — KC Mark under ECPSA / KS C IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — ECPSA下的KC标志 / KS C IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — ECPSA下的KC標誌 / KS C IEC 60034-1

summary.en: Under South Korea's ECPSA, industrial AC motors within the covered product scope must obtain KC Mark certification for electrical safety before being placed on the South Korea market. The applicable KS standard is KS C IEC 60034-1 (adopted from IEC 60034-1, Rotating electrical machines — Part 1: Rating and performance) and related KS C IEC 60034 series. Safety testing must be performed at 60 Hz rated conditions. Testing is conducted by designated conformity assessment bodies (e.g., KTL — Korea Testing Laboratory, KETI, or other accredited bodies). A certificate of conformity and test report at 60 Hz are required for KC Mark issuance.
summary.zh: 根据韩国ECPSA，覆盖产品范围内的工业交流电机在投放韩国市场前须取得KC标志电气安全认证。适用KS标准为KS C IEC 60034-1（采用IEC 60034-1，旋转电机第1部分：额定值和性能）及相关KS C IEC 60034系列。安全测试须在60 Hz额定条件下进行。测试由指定合格评定机构进行（如KTL——韩国测试实验室、KETI或其他认可机构）。KC标志颁发须有60 Hz条件下的合格证书和测试报告。
summary.zht: 根據韓國ECPSA，覆蓋產品範圍內的工業交流電機在投放韓國市場前須取得KC標誌電氣安全認證。適用KS標準為KS C IEC 60034-1（採用IEC 60034-1，旋轉電機第1部分：額定值和性能）及相關KS C IEC 60034系列。安全測試須在60 Hz額定條件下進行。測試由指定合格評定機構進行（如KTL——韓國測試實驗室、KETI或其他認可機構）。KC標誌頒發須有60 Hz條件下的合格證書和測試報告。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-1 (adopted IEC 60034-1, rating and performance at 60 Hz)

summary.en: China's electrical safety requirements for motors use GB/T 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) and related GB/T 60034 series. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is required for motors in the CCC mandatory catalogue. Safety testing is performed to applicable GB standards at 50 Hz rated conditions by CNAS-accredited laboratories. CCC certificates are issued by CNCA-approved certification bodies. CCC does not provide equivalence recognition for South Korea KC Mark.
summary.zh: 中国电机电气安全要求采用GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）及相关GB/T 60034系列。CCC强制认证目录范围内的电机须取得CCC认证。安全测试由CNAS认可实验室按适用GB标准在50 Hz额定条件下进行。CCC证书由国家认证认可监督管理委员会批准的认证机构颁发。CCC不提供对韩国KC标志的等效认可。
summary.zht: 中國電機電氣安全要求採用GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）及相關GB/T 60034系列。CCC強制認證目錄範圍內的電機須取得CCC認證。安全測試由CNAS認可實驗室按適用GB標準在50 Hz額定條件下進行。CCC證書由國家認證認可監督管理委員會批准的認證機構頒發。CCC不提供對韓國KC標誌的等效認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for motors in scope

gap.en: CCC certification for electrical safety at 50 Hz does not substitute for KC Mark under ECPSA at 60 Hz. The underlying test standard (KS C IEC 60034-1 at 60 Hz vs GB/T 755 at 50 Hz) requires separate test execution. A 50 Hz Chinese safety test report cannot be directly used for KC Mark issuance. Motors must be re-tested at 60 Hz by a South Korea-designated conformity assessment body to obtain KC Mark.
gap.zh: 在50 Hz下获得的电气安全CCC认证不能替代ECPSA下在60 Hz下的KC标志。基础测试标准（60 Hz下KS C IEC 60034-1与50 Hz下GB/T 755）需要单独执行测试。50 Hz的中国安全测试报告不能直接用于KC标志颁发。电机须由韩国指定合格评定机构在60 Hz下重新测试，以取得KC标志。
gap.zht: 在50 Hz下獲得的電氣安全CCC認證不能替代ECPSA下在60 Hz下的KC標誌。基礎測試標準（60 Hz下KS C IEC 60034-1與50 Hz下GB/T 755）需要單獨執行測試。50 Hz的中國安全測試報告不能直接用於KC標誌頒發。電機須由韓國指定合格評定機構在60 Hz下重新測試，以取得KC標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Mark under ECPSA is a legal prerequisite for placing motors in scope on the South Korea market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for motors in the CCC mandatory catalogue; separate from KC requirements

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CCC certification obtained in China for electrical safety at 50 Hz does not satisfy South Korea's KC Mark requirement under ECPSA. Motors must be re-tested at 60 Hz rated conditions by a designated South Korea conformity assessment body. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在中国取得的50 Hz条件下电气安全CCC认证，不满足韩国ECPSA下的KC标志要求。电机须由指定韩国合格评定机构在60 Hz额定条件下重新测试。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在中國取得的50 Hz條件下電氣安全CCC認證，不滿足韓國ECPSA下的KC標誌要求。電機須由指定韓國合格評定機構在60 Hz額定條件下重新測試。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Insulation, Thermal Class, and Degree of Protection — KS C IEC 60034 series
requirement_topic.zh: 绝缘、热等级和防护等级 — KS C IEC 60034系列
requirement_topic.zht: 絕緣、熱等級和防護等級 — KS C IEC 60034系列

summary.en: South Korea's KC Mark certification under ECPSA requires motors to comply with KS C IEC 60034-5 (degree of protection, IP rating), KS C IEC 60034-6 (cooling methods, IC designation), and insulation class requirements per KS C IEC 60034-1. These standards are adopted from the IEC 60034 series. Motors operating at 60 Hz may generate different thermal profiles than 50 Hz operation due to altered iron losses and cooling air volume (fan speed scales with frequency). Insulation class and thermal withstand must be verified under 60 Hz operating conditions. KC Mark certification assessment covers these safety aspects.
summary.zh: 韩国ECPSA下的KC标志认证要求电机符合KS C IEC 60034-5（防护等级，IP评级）、KS C IEC 60034-6（冷却方式，IC标识）及KS C IEC 60034-1的绝缘等级要求。这些标准均采用自IEC 60034系列。与50 Hz相比，在60 Hz下运行的电机因铁损和冷却空气量改变（风扇转速随频率变化），可能产生不同的热特性。绝缘等级和耐热性须在60 Hz运行条件下核验。KC标志认证评定涵盖上述安全方面。
summary.zht: 韓國ECPSA下的KC標誌認證要求電機符合KS C IEC 60034-5（防護等級，IP評級）、KS C IEC 60034-6（冷卻方式，IC標識）及KS C IEC 60034-1的絕緣等級要求。這些標準均採用自IEC 60034系列。與50 Hz相比，在60 Hz下運行的電機因鐵損和冷卻空氣量改變（風扇轉速隨頻率變化），可能產生不同的熱特性。絕緣等級和耐熱性須在60 Hz運行條件下核驗。KC標誌認證評定涵蓋上述安全方面。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-5 (adopted IEC 60034-5, degrees of protection IP code)
KS C IEC 60034-6 (adopted IEC 60034-6, cooling methods IC code)
KS C IEC 60034-1 (insulation class and thermal requirements at 60 Hz)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 4942 (equivalent to IEC 60034-5, IP code), GB/T 1993 (equivalent to IEC 60034-6, cooling methods), and GB/T 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent, insulation class) for Chinese motors at 50 Hz. Chinese test reports on IP, cooling, and insulation class are issued at 50 Hz operating conditions. A motor's thermal performance at 60 Hz will differ from 50 Hz due to higher iron losses at higher frequency (depending on design) and increased fan speed. Chinese test data at 50 Hz is not directly transferable for South Korea 60 Hz safety assessment.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 4942（等同IEC 60034-5，IP代码）、GB/T 1993（等同IEC 60034-6，冷却方式）和GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1，绝缘等级）对50 Hz电机进行规范。中国有关IP、冷却和绝缘等级的测试报告均在50 Hz运行条件下出具。由于在较高频率下铁损可能增大（取决于设计）和风扇转速提高，电机在60 Hz下的热性能与50 Hz下不同。中国50 Hz条件下的测试数据不能直接用于韩国60 Hz安全评定。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 4942（等同IEC 60034-5，IP代碼）、GB/T 1993（等同IEC 60034-6，冷卻方式）和GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1，絕緣等級）對50 Hz電機進行規範。中國有關IP、冷卻和絕緣等級的測試報告均在50 Hz運行條件下出具。由於在較高頻率下鐵損可能增大（取決於設計）和風扇轉速提高，電機在60 Hz下的熱性能與50 Hz下不同。中國50 Hz條件下的測試數據不能直接用於韓國60 Hz安全評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 755-2019 (equivalent IEC 60034-1, insulation class at 50 Hz)

gap.en: Chinese insulation class and thermal test data obtained at 50 Hz cannot be directly applied to South Korea's 60 Hz KC Mark assessment. Thermal performance at 60 Hz must be specifically verified because iron losses and cooling air volume (fan-driven) change with frequency. A motor meeting insulation class F or H at 50 Hz may exhibit different temperature rise margins at 60 Hz depending on its electromagnetic design. Re-testing at 60 Hz at a South Korea-designated body is required.
gap.zh: 在50 Hz条件下获得的中国绝缘等级和热性能测试数据，不能直接用于韩国60 Hz KC标志评定。在60 Hz下的热性能须专项核验，因为铁损和冷却空气量（风扇驱动）随频率变化。在50 Hz下满足F级或H级绝缘等级的电机，在60 Hz下的温升裕量可能因其电磁设计而有所不同。须在韩国指定机构在60 Hz下重新测试。
gap.zht: 在50 Hz條件下獲得的中國絕緣等級和熱性能測試數據，不能直接用於韓國60 Hz KC標誌評定。在60 Hz下的熱性能須專項核驗，因為鐵損和冷卻空氣量（風扇驅動）隨頻率變化。在50 Hz下滿足F級或H級絕緣等級的電機，在60 Hz下的溫升裕量可能因其電磁設計而有所不同。須在韓國指定機構在60 Hz下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Mark certification under ECPSA covers insulation, thermal, IP, and cooling compliance at 60 Hz rated conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 755, GB/T 4942, GB/T 1993 apply at 50 Hz; CCC covers safety for listed motors

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese insulation class, IP, and cooling method test data at 50 Hz are not directly applicable for South Korea KC Mark assessment at 60 Hz. Thermal performance differences between 50 Hz and 60 Hz operation must be assessed and documented. Re-testing at 60 Hz by a South Korea-designated conformity assessment body is required. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or engineering advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国50 Hz条件下的绝缘等级、IP和冷却方式测试数据，不能直接用于韩国60 Hz KC标志评定。50 Hz和60 Hz运行之间的热性能差异须经评估和记录。须由韩国指定合格评定机构在60 Hz下重新测试。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或工程建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國50 Hz條件下的絕緣等級、IP和冷卻方式測試數據，不能直接用於韓國60 Hz KC標誌評定。50 Hz和60 Hz運行之間的熱性能差異須經評估和記錄。須由韓國指定合格評定機構在60 Hz下重新測試。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或工程建議。
